proposals.title: UP_TRI × Bear: n=96, 94.7% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=UP_TRI, regime=Bear (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +41.1pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.8815 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.61 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)
approval would propagate overlap to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=96, wr=94.7%, edge +41.1pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=96, Wilson lower 0.8815, +41.1pp edge over UP_TRI baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.61. Cohort is regime-gated to Bear while current regime is Choppy (stable, 7 days) with 100% Choppy exposure across 25 open positions, so activation is deferred and existing concentration is not compounded. Consistent with continuous prior approvals of this exact cohort (2026-04-29 through 2026-06-09) and no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: Exposure concentration: by_regime + by_signal_type×sector×regime = Choppy regime (100%); UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank (20%) and UP_TRI×Choppy×Auto (20%) (100.0%)

claim.what: Concentration risk: by_regime + by_signal_type×sector×regime = Choppy regime (100%); UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank (20%) and UP_TRI×Choppy×Auto (20%); recommended action: Pause new entries in regime=Choppy AND in sectors Bank, Auto until (a) Bank/Auto cell shares drop below 0.18 via natural Day 6 exits, AND (b) Choppy×UP_TRI cohort promotes from Candidate to Tier M, OR add a hedge (NIFTY/BANKNIFTY put or short futures) sized to offset ~40% of Bank+Auto exposure as protection against a Choppy→Bear regime flip.
claim.expected_effect: Trader awareness of tail risk: A Choppy→Bear regime flip would unwind the entire 25-position long book simultaneously, with Bank (6 positions, 24%) and Auto (5 positions, 20%) clustering meaning a single high-beta sector shock could compound the regime drawdown. With cohort edge unvalidated at Candidate tier, there is no statistical floor under the loss distribution.

evidence: regime_concentration triggered: Choppy at observed 1.0 vs threshold 0.80 (25/25 positions)
UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank cell at 0.20 share (5/25) — at the cell threshold
UP_TRI×Choppy×Auto cell at 0.20 share (5/25) — at the cell threshold
UP_TRI signal mix at 21/25 = 84% — just below 0.85 but with book fully long-directional (UP_TRI + BULL_PROXY + UP_TRI_SA = 25/25 = 100%)
Matched Choppy×UP_TRI cohort at Candidate tier only (n=188) — unvalidated edge for all three concentration cells
risks: Recommendation may be over-cautious; concentration may be edge-validated
Trader may already be aware; informational only

proposals.reversibility: Informational warning; no system mutation. Suppresses on next run if concentration drops below threshold.

decision_metadata.recommended_action: Pause new entries in regime=Choppy AND in sectors Bank, Auto until (a) Bank/Auto cell shares drop below 0.18 via natural Day 6 exits, AND (b) Choppy×UP_TRI cohort promotes from Candidate to Tier M, OR add a hedge (NIFTY/BANKNIFTY put or short futures) sized to offset ~40% of Bank+Auto exposure as protection against a Choppy→Bear regime flip.
decision_metadata.tail_risk_scenario: A Choppy→Bear regime flip would unwind the entire 25-position long book simultaneously, with Bank (6 positions, 24%) and Auto (5 positions, 20%) clustering meaning a single high-beta sector shock could compound the regime drawdown. With cohort edge unvalidated at Candidate tier, there is no statistical floor under the loss distribution.
decision_metadata.llm_rationale: Portfolio is 100% Choppy regime (observed 1.0, above the 0.80 threshold) AND two cells breach the 0.20 cell threshold: UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank and UP_TRI×Choppy×Auto both at 20%. UP_TRI also dominates signal mix at 21/25 = 84% (just below 0.85) with the book fully directional long. Matched Choppy×UP_TRI cohort sits only at Candidate tier (n=188) — unvalidated edge across all concentration cells.
